creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
Update for port games/palomino to v20131231 is available. It contains several bugfixes and improvements.

Note: 
Port games/palomino has a direct dependency to port graphics/osg.
So maybe this change should be done together with 
PR:185227: [UPDATE] graphics/osg to v3.2.0.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
